field_notes.prompt: The fixture uses Optional.empty() so the packet-support proof does not expand into prompt Component rendering, UI behavior, download, reload, or pack application.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration clientbound resource_pack_push packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official no-prompt fixture only; do not infer resource-pack UI behavior, pack download/reload/application behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
